businessValue: Improves operator situational awareness with synchronized multi-display alarm handling.
description: Motion alarms automatically open workflow in Talos and quad view in Salvo for multi-panel operator monitoring.
title: Multi-Monitor Talos-Salvo Integration

businessValue: Reduces operator response time by automatically displaying relevant camera feeds during alarm events.
description: Alarm-triggered automatic video streaming with zone-based camera selection and role-based permissions.
title: AutoStream - Automated Video Streaming

businessValue: Eliminates manual report preparation time for compliance and operational reviews.
description: Enhanced reporting dashboard with custom filters, scheduled report generation, and PDF export.
title: Advanced Reporting Dashboard

businessValue: Prevents unexpected API throttling for integrators building on GCXONE platform.
description: Real-time API usage dashboard showing current rate limits and consumption metrics.
title: API Rate Limit Visibility

businessValue: Reduces compliance team overhead by automating mandatory reporting.
description: Scheduled PDF compliance report generation with customizable templates.
title: Automated Compliance Reports

businessValue: Enables seamless integration with existing central monitoring station infrastructure.
description: Marketplace integration for DC09-compatible CMS platforms (Evalink Talos, Amwin, Lisa, Immix) with encrypted alarm forwarding.
title: DC09 Alarm Management System Integration

businessValue: Enables remote monitoring for on-call operators and reduces response time.
description: Native mobile app for operators to monitor and acknowledge alarms on the go.
title: Mobile App Operator Dashboard

businessValue: Enables expansion into Spanish-speaking monitoring station markets.
description: UI language switching starting with English and Spanish for Latin American markets.
title: Multi-Language Support (Phase 1)

businessValue: Reduces missed alarms during shift changeover - top customer feedback item.
description: Structured handover notes attached to alarm queue state for seamless shift transitions.
title: Operator Shift Handover Notes

businessValue: Streamlines device management workflows, reducing configuration time by 40%.
description: Full lifecycle control for devices, sites, sensors, and customers with activation/deactivation and rediscovery.
title: Device Lifecycle Management

businessValue: Reduces role management overhead by 60% for large deployments with complex permission structures.
description: Complete RBAC system rework with hierarchical entity assignments, dynamic privilege filtering, and permission overrides.
title: Role-Based Access Control System

businessValue: Reduces missed alarms during shift changeover — top feedback item from Q4 customer survey.
description: Structured handover notes field that operators complete at end-of-shift, attached to the active alarm queue state.
title: Operator shift handover notes

businessValue: Eliminates 4+ hours/month of manual report preparation for compliance teams.
description: Schedule and auto-generate compliance reports in PDF format on a weekly or monthly cadence.
title: Automated compliance report generation

businessValue: Opens the platform to Spanish-speaking operators; required for two pending enterprise contracts.
description: UI language switching for English and Spanish — targeted at Latin American market.
title: Multi-language support (Phase 1)

businessValue: Prevents unexpected API throttling by giving integrators real-time usage visibility.
description: Show current API usage and rate limit status in the developer dashboard.
title: API rate limit visibility

businessValue: Reduces manual data export effort by 60% for weekly reporting workflows.
description: Date range, custom field filters, and filter preset saving for reports.
title: Advanced reporting filters

businessValue: Reduces mean time to acknowledge alarms by 40% in high-volume environments.
description: Group active alarms by zone or device type for faster operator triage.
title: New alarm grouping view

businessValue: Reduces device setup time by 80% for deployments with 50+ devices.
description: Allow operators to configure multiple devices simultaneously from a single panel — reduces setup time for large deployments.
title: Bulk device configuration
